title: haplopteris graminea
intro: Haplopteris graminea, also known as the common Boston fern or Boston ivy, is a type of plant belonging to the family Lomariopsidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Haplopteris graminea include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Haplopteris graminea is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be applied topically as a salve or compress to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
